title: Bedrock Edition: Renew
description: Bedrock Edition ported into Java with the menus, features and more, "play with your friends"!
body:
# Bedrock Edition: Renew ![https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/1rywjt8g&logo=modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/1rywjt8g&logo=modrinth) **This modpack makes Minecraft Java Edition, Bedrock Edition. It changes the in-game menus, adds a lot of Bedrock features and imrproves the game's optimization.**
![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c546d861c8dc59d31924d1ff47fb67ec7aec91.jpeg)
Features - Armor Stand Arms. - Bedrock-like loading screens with helpful tips. - Third person eating animations. - Sheared Sheep Colors - How to play menu. - Entity Culling. - Bedrock Pause Menu. - No Chat Reports. - Position and "paper doll" overlay. - Dynamic Inactive Hud Opacity. - Saving status overlay. - 3D fishing hook - Bedrock Cauldrons that hold dyed water and potions - Bedrock Sun Glare - Bedrock Chunk Loading Animation - Bedrock Crafting Recipes (Toggleable). - Bedrock-like chat. - Bedrock Edition world color noise for grass and water. - Idle hand animations. - Held item descriptions (enchantments, books and potions). - Reach-around block placement. - Dying and Fallen Trees! - Bedrock Light block shading. - Disable flying momentum (Drift) in creative mode. - Stop elytra flying by pressing space on air. - Quick armor swapping. - Items don't despawn after you die. - Bedrock Impaling. - Bedrock Jumping Sounds. - Bedrock Inventory Animations. - Bedrock Wither. - Bedrock like menus. - Bedrock like gui colors. - Enchantment icons. - Better held item info. - Instant world quit. - Nether Portal Fix on multiplayer servers. - Block Culling. - Automatic language choosing. - Better packet sending. - Smooth scrolling. - Better and cleaner debug menu (F3). - Bedrock Armor Stand Arms. - Bedrock Accarute Block Placement. - Bedrock Bubbles. - Capes feature (Allows you to see/use capes from other mods like OptiFine). - See greater then server's render distance. - Skyboxes in Fabric. - Debugify (fixes a lot of vanilla bugs). - Shaders. - Model Gap Fix. - Controler support. - Bedrock Snowy Leaves. - Leaf Culling. - First Person Animations in Third Person. - No Attack Cooldown. - No Mining cooldown. - World Hosting to your friends. - OptiFine Texture Pack Features. - ScreenShot Viewer In-Gane. - Bedrock-like marketplace which allows you to download datapacks, resourcepacks, worlds and shaders. - Bedrock-like world creating menu. - Camera from education edition. - Bedrock-like Creative Inventory. - No Chat Reports and Telemetry. - Longer chat history. - Better Performance
## Questions & Answers
Can you use this modpack in servers? Yes and no; Bedrock Edition: Renew is built for singeplayer and world hosting, other servers' anti-cheats may detect this modpack as a cheat, or just don't allow you to join at all. And also yes, you can copy the mods folder from the modpack into a fabric server's mods folder and then use the server with this modpack.
Why the Dress Room button is not working? I deleted the mod to it because it was crashing the game, so its just a decoration.
I suggest you should do this, or I should contact you. You can use the contact box at the bottom of the main page of [my website](https://anakama.xyz) if you need to contact me, and you can submit an issue at the [NetherTeam Issue Tracker](https://netherteam.pages.dev/issue-tracker).
## Credits - Idea: [xdf22](https://xdf22.pages.dev) (My friend.) - Other: [Anakama](https://anakama.xyz) (Me.) - Some of Bedrock Assets: [seriousfreezing](https://github.com/seriousfreezing) - Bedrock-like GUI Textures: Made by [StardustSys](https://modrinth.com/user/StardustSys) and edited by [Anakama](https://anakama.xyz). (Me.) ## NOTE: - This project uses assets from [Bedrock Reloaded](https://seriousfreezing.gitbook.io/bedrock-reloaded).
